highlights.description: OmniVault AWS providers consolidated into omni-aws monorepo
AWS Secrets Manager and Parameter Store support for secret management

added.description: [omnivault] AWS Secrets Manager provider implementing `vault.Vault` and `vault.ExtendedVault` interfaces
[omnivault] AWS Parameter Store provider implementing `vault.Vault` interface
[omnivault] Convenience functions `NewSecretsManager()` and `NewParameterStore()` for quick setup
[omnivault] Support for custom AWS config, region, profile, and endpoint URL
[omnivault] JSON parsing for Secrets Manager secrets with field extraction
[omnivault] Version staging labels support for Secrets Manager
[omnivault] Path prefix support for Parameter Store namespacing
[omnivault] Secret rotation trigger for Secrets Manager
[omnivault] Version history retrieval for both providers

changed.description: Migrated from standalone `omnivault-aws` repository (v0.2.0) into omni-aws monorepo

internal.description: Previous omnivault-aws releases: v0.1.0 (initial), v0.2.0 (org rename)

highlights.description: Consolidated to single Go module at repository root
Unified AWS provider package with both LLM (Bedrock) and Storage (S3) adapters

upgradeGuide.description: Import paths remain the same: `github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnillm` and `github.com/plexusone/omni-aws/omnistorage`
Run `go get github.com/plexusone/omni-aws@v0.7.0` to update dependency

changed.description: Removed nested `omnillm/go.mod` and `omnistorage/go.mod` in favor of root-level `go.mod`
Consolidated changelogs from per-module to single repository changelog

highlights.description: [omnillm] Repository reorganized as multi-module AWS provider package

added.description: [omnistorage] S3 backend implementing `omnistorage.ExtendedBackend` interface
[omnistorage] Support for AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces
[omnistorage] Streaming read/write with multipart upload support
[omnistorage] Server-side copy and move operations
[omnistorage] Backend registry integration (auto-registers as `s3`)

changed.description: [omnillm] Dependency changed from `omnillm` v0.14.0 to `omnillm-core` v0.15.0

highlights.description: [omnillm] Organization migration from agentplexus to plexusone
[omnillm] Streaming support via Bedrock ConverseStream API
[omnillm] Full tool/function calling with streaming tool deltas

added.description: [omnillm] Streaming support via `CreateChatCompletionStream`
[omnillm] Tool/function calling support with `ToolConfiguration` mapping
[omnillm] Bearer token authentication via `AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK`
[omnillm] Integration tests (8 tests) and unit tests (18 tests)
[omnillm] Core chat completion support via Bedrock Converse API
[omnillm] System message handling, multi-turn conversation support
[omnillm] Inference configuration (MaxTokens, Temperature, TopP, Stop)
[omnillm] Initial release with basic Bedrock client wrapper
[omnillm] Provider interface implementation for omnillm
